description.value:
Storm-run lines carved by ridge-runners — Skjoldfjellsmål ridge-runners carve directional runes into their equipment to navigate storms; when applied to a weapon, the runes redirect force outward at the moment of impact, throwing the struck target backward.

Effect: Once per turn, when you hit a creature with a strike using this weapon, you can push the target 1 square.

Rules: Forced Movement (Push); Squares; Strike.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least quality craft; a ridge-runner's directional rune-set carved during a Skjoldfjell storm
